name: deepresearch-se
description: Deep-research Cloudflare Worker. No build step — deployed via `npx wrangler deploy`, reading src/ as plain JS. This package.json exists only to run the unit test suite and the type-checker (both dev-only; neither is part of the deploy).

scripts.test: node --test src/*.test.js public/js/*.test.js sdk/*.test.mjs scripts/*.test.mjs tests/*.test.js
